headline.text: L3 ML4 gondola lost position *3 times* during the shift — maintenance found a reset workaround but root cause remains unresolved.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran smoothly with minor issues. Twist Wrap cutter gear broke overnight and was replaced with the last spare in stock. S3 will run out of 10257 chocolate tomorrow and requested a switch to 10227. Pretzel supply for the week is confirmed with three loads inbound.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML3 was down most of the afternoon on film issues — a broken bolt on the dancing arm was found at 15:16 and maintenance is extracting it for replacement. FFS box printer failed again at 15:37, the same issue that caused stoppages yesterday. ML2 had two quick film rips that were cleared inside 5 minutes each.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML4 gondola lost position three separate times, requiring line stops and re-zeroing each time. Maintenance identified that opening a door resets the ramp, but the root cause (suspected bowed carriage slats) is not addressed. MF Matrix scale vibration was resolved — three linear feeders were found installed incorrectly. ML1 had a broken chain tooth that was replaced quickly.

watchlist.reason: ML2 Theegarten was down all of yesterday's shift with an unresolved HMI/motor fault. Zero messages in today's window — unclear if resolved or still down, but needs follow-up.

notes.text: Erandy posted RCA action from previous salt issue: hourly check now added to Line Lead LSW for tunnel 3 belt slipping due to excess salt.
Erandy coordinating with L2 maintenance to train L1 team on new TG flow-wrap disassembly tomorrow at 9am.

closed_today.title: MF Matrix bucket errors causing bag re-injection issues
closed_today.resolution_comment: Resolved 2026-05-12. Nathan Ruiz found the root cause at 20:17: three linear feeders were installed incorrectly, causing the vibration faults and bucket errors. After re-zeroing, the system is working well. Source: "After inspection I found 3 linear feeders set up like this which was causing the vibration faults."

opened_today.title: ML3 dancing arm bolt broken — extracting and replacing
opened_today.summary: Broken bolt on the dancing arm causing repeated film breaks — maintenance extracting the broken piece and replacing with a new bolt.

opened_today.title: Twist Wrap cutter gear broken — last spare used for replacement
opened_today.summary: Cutter gear broke overnight and was replaced with the last spare in stock — no additional inventory available and this gear only needs to last 2-3 more racks.

opened_today.title: S3 chocolate 10257 running out tomorrow — requesting switch to 10227
opened_today.summary: S3 will exhaust 10257 chocolate tomorrow — requesting approval to switch to 10227 to avoid a line stoppage.
